PGVRBody.PGVRCell: If you see a question mark (?) in your alphabet or some other strange charaters, that means that the font has no support for your language. Please, change the font and try again.

PGVRBody.PGVRText: Print a green text on a new line

Print a red text with
a forced new line included

This is a very boring, lame and long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long loooooong text.
I am amazed that you are actually reading this long and lame text!

PGVRBody.PGVRCell: Page wide cell with center aligned text, borders and background color
Borders only at the bottom and on the left side
Second cell - Next to the first cell with auto adjusted cell height
Third cell - Bellow the second cell without borders
Fourth cell - 300 points wide. Back to the margin on the next line
Red border color and with right text align

(LF)10 points from the margin,
Let's see what we can do with line feeds in cells(LF)
and with 8 line feed(2xLF)
This should be 8 lines(LF)
and more line feed nagging(2xLF)

PGVRTextBox.PGVRText: Page wide textbox with borders and background color
Textbox 2 - 200 pt wide next to Texbox 1 and with a new line (wordwrap)
Textbox 3 - 200 pt wide. Back to the margin on the next line

1 PGVRTextBox with 4 PGVRText element - If all the PGVRText has the same style name, then the first PGVRText color will be inherited by the rest of the PGVRText regardles what the rest of the PGVRText color settings are
1 PGVRTextBox with 4 PGVRText element - When a style name is changing for a PGVRText element so does the color setting

10 points from the margin on a new line(LF)
and with a line feed and a very long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long ,long, long, long, long, long, long, long, long text.(LF)

(LF)20 points from the margin(LF)
with line feeds all over in this box and this line should also be wordwraped(LF)
200 points wide(2xLF)

PGVRBody.PGVRCell: 100 pt wide image, 10 points from the margin, auto align
Pagewide horizontal line. From margin to margin...
10 points from the page side and 100 points wide
10 points from the page side and 1000 points wide (wider then A4)

PRIV_PUBLIC (Show to public)
PRIV_USER (Show only to authenticated users)
PRIV_NONE (Show only to admin users)
PRIV_HIDE (Hide even from admin users)
Can be a plain text or a language variable
Will also be added to the PDF Document Properties
Can be a plain text or a language variable
Will also be added to the PDF Document Properties
sources Show or hide the Source input setting according to the users Privacy Setting

text Can be any text
select Dropdown list
checkbox Checked or unchecked
options options => A list of choices. Used only with the select type.
name options => any name, this will be a reference as a variable name, REQUIRED
value options => Can be anything. Global variables, strings, numbers

PGVRSetVar.name: string2
PGVRSetVar.value: Look what I can do mom!

PGVRBody.PGVRCell: Both strings in one single variable :
var options => Name of the variable, REQUIRED
date options => 1, This marks if the variable is a date.
Without the date="1" attribute, the date will be printed as 1 Aug 2000
When the date="1" attribute is set, the date will be printed as 1 August 2000

Reserved and required specific style names:
genby : Used by the Generated by... text
footnote : Used by the Footnotes text, like the source list at the bottom of the page
footnotenum : Used by the link numbers in the text to the Footnotes

DEFAULT PDF=dejavusans
DEFAULT HTML=arial (HTML never uses dejavusans)
style options => DEFAULT - no style, can be empty or any combination of these letters

b = bold
i = italic
u = underline
d = line trough

4A0, 2A0, A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, A7, A8, A9, A10
B0, B1, B2, B3, B4, B5, B6, B7, B8, B9, B10
C0, C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, C6/5, C6, C7/6, C7, C8, C9, C10, DL
RA0, RA1, RA2, RA3, RA4
SRA0, SRA1, SRA2, SRA3, SRA4
A2EXTRA, A2SUPER, A3EXTRA, SUPERA3, A4EXTRA, A4LONG, A4SUPER, SUPERA4, A5EXTRA, SOB5EXTRA
JB0, JB1, JB2, JB3, JB4, JB5, JB6, JB7, JB8, JB9, JB10
EXECUTIVE, FOLIO, FOOLSCAP, LEDGER, LEGAL, LETTER, QUARTO, STATEMENT, USGOVT
customheight options => If customheight AND customwidth are set then pageSize will be ignored
customwidth options => If customheight AND customwidth are set then pageSize will be ignored
align options => DEFAULT=empty, auto align (left on LTR, right on RTL)

left
center
right
leftrtl => Change to right when RTL
rightrtl => Change to left when RTL
bgcolor options => DEFAULT=empty, no background color
border options => DEFAULT=0 or empty (not visible)
OR one or any combination of these letters

L (left side)
R (right side)
T (top side)
B (bottom side)
fill options => DEFAULT=1 (paint the backgrond color only if bgcolor is set)
height options => DEFAULT=empty. Minimum height. If there are any text then the Box height will adjust it self
left options => DEFAULT='.' or empty, current position
newline options => DEFAULT=0 (no new line after this cell)
stretch options => DEFAULT=0 or empty, no stretching. Supported only by PDF

1 (Horizontal scaling only if necessary)
2 (Forced horizontal scaling)
3 (Character spacing only if necessary)
4 (Forced character spacing)
top options => DEFAULT='.' or empty, current position
width options => DEFAULT=0 or empty, page wide (max to the margin)
bgcolor options => DEFAULT=empty, no background color
border options => DEFAULT=0 or empty (not visible)
fill options => DEFAULT=1 (paint the backgrond color only if bgcolor is set)
height options => DEFAULT=empty. Minimum height. If there are any text then the Box height will adjust it self
left options => DEFAULT='.' or empty, current position
newline options => DEFAULT=0 (no new line after this Box)
padding options => DEFAULT=1 Use cell padding
pagecheck options => DEFAULT=1 Check for pagebreak
reseth options => DEFAULT=0 Don't reset the last height after this Box
1 Reset the last height once this Box is printed
top options => DEFAULT='.' or empty, current position
width options => DEFAULT=0 or empty, page wide (max to the margin)
filter# options => Can be any number of filter setting
condition options => PHP style condition. The returned condition has to be TRUE or FALSE
PGVRGeneration => Print the generation counter. DEAFULT=1. Will be set by PGVRRelatives or set it manually with PGVRSetVar (@generation)
sp => Create a space, same as ' '
